case_title: OM/UDR SF LLC VS. DIMITRY MEKSIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEKSIN, DIMITRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 399 FREMONT STREET #721, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OM/UDR SF LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MEKSIN, DIMITRY DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
